class.name: PlayFabPartyChatMessage
class.brief_description: A text or transcription message delivered through PlayFab Party chat.

method.name: get_sender_entity_key
method.description: Returns the PlayFab entity key dictionary of the sender.

method.name: get_targets
method.description: Returns the list of target [PlayFabPartyChatControl] instances.

method.name: get_language_code
method.description: Returns the source language code, if known.

method.name: get_translated_text
method.description: Returns the translated message text, if translation was requested.

method.name: is_transcription
method.description: Returns whether this message originated from speech-to-text transcription.

method.name: get_timestamp
method.description: Returns the millisecond timestamp captured when the message was produced.

method.name: get_metadata
method.description: Returns the optional metadata dictionary attached to the message.

members.member: PlayFab entity key dictionary of the sender.
Whether the message originated from speech-to-text transcription.
